title: LMCommonCore
description: Coremod enabling easier creation of multiplatform mods and providing shared functionality for my mods
body:
# LMCommonCore
LMCommonCore is a Minecraft coremod for Fabric, Forge and NeoForge providing common features and code to my other mods, especially by enabling loader-agnostic registry handling.

### Do I need this mod?
This mod does not provide any gameplay-related features, since it is meant to be used in conjunction with other mods.
Currently used by:
- [Mythocraft](https://modrinth.com/project/mythocraft)
